description: Cannot connect to VPN from home
suggested_action: Restart VPN client, check internet connection, verify VPN credentials.

description: Need password reset for email account
suggested_action: Verify user identity and reset password through identity portal.

description: Laptop running very slow after update
suggested_action: Check system updates, restart device, review running processes.

description: Azure virtual machine is not responding
suggested_action: Check Azure portal status, restart VM, review monitoring logs.

description: Power BI dashboard is not refreshing
suggested_action: Check dataset refresh schedule, verify gateway connection, review data source credentials.

description: Unable to access shared company folder
suggested_action: Check user permissions and confirm access group membership.

description: Wi-Fi keeps disconnecting in office
suggested_action: Restart network adapter, check signal strength, escalate if multiple users affected.

description: Printer is not responding
suggested_action: Check printer connection, restart printer, reinstall printer driver if needed.

description: Application crashes when opening reports
suggested_action: Collect error logs, restart application, check recent updates.

description: Database connection timeout error
suggested_action: Check database server availability, review connection string, escalate to database admin.

description: Teams meeting audio not working
suggested_action: Check microphone permissions, restart Teams, test audio device.

description: Cloud storage upload failed
suggested_action: Check storage account status, verify permissions, retry upload.

description: Employee cannot login after password change
suggested_action: Confirm password sync, unlock account, verify MFA status.

description: Company website is loading slowly
suggested_action: Check network latency, review server health, escalate to web operations team.

description: Excel file with business data is corrupted
suggested_action: Restore previous version, check file permissions, validate backup availability.

description: Suspicious email received with unknown attachment
suggested_action: Do not open attachment, report phishing email, scan mailbox and endpoint.

description: User account locked after multiple failed login attempts
suggested_action: Unlock account after identity verification and review failed login history.

description: Azure storage container access denied
suggested_action: Check role-based access permissions and storage account policies.

description: Firewall blocking access to internal application
suggested_action: Review firewall rules, validate access request, and update rule if approved.

description: Laptop battery drains very quickly
suggested_action: Check battery health, power settings, and replace battery if required.

description: Power BI report shows incorrect sales numbers
suggested_action: Validate source data, check transformation logic, and refresh report dataset.

description: ERP application shows server error
suggested_action: Check application logs, restart service, and escalate to app team.

description: Possible malware detected on workstation
suggested_action: Isolate device, run malware scan, and escalate to security incident response.

description: Cannot connect to office Wi-Fi
suggested_action: Forget network, reconnect, verify credentials, and check access point status.

description: New employee needs access to HR system
suggested_action: Confirm manager approval and add user to correct access group.

description: Azure web app deployment failed
suggested_action: Review deployment logs, check build errors, and validate app service settings.

description: SQL query is running very slowly
suggested_action: Review query performance, indexes, and database resource usage.

description: Monitor screen flickering during work
suggested_action: Check display cable, update graphics driver, and test another monitor.

description: Outlook keeps freezing when sending emails
suggested_action: Restart Outlook, check add-ins, and repair Office installation.

description: User clicked a suspicious link in email
suggested_action: Reset password, review sign-in logs, scan device, and report incident.

description: VPN disconnects every few minutes
suggested_action: Check VPN logs, network stability, and client version.

description: Unable to access SharePoint documents
suggested_action: Verify SharePoint permissions and Microsoft 365 group membership.

description: Azure function is timing out
suggested_action: Review function logs, timeout settings, and connected service performance.

description: Dashboard refresh failed because gateway is offline
suggested_action: Restart gateway service and verify data source connectivity.

description: Keyboard keys are not working
suggested_action: Clean keyboard, test external keyboard, and replace hardware if needed.

description: Internal application login page not loading
suggested_action: Check application server status, browser cache, and service availability.

description: Multiple users report slow internet
suggested_action: Check network outage, bandwidth usage, and escalate to network operations.

description: MFA code not received on phone
suggested_action: Verify MFA method, update phone number, and re-register authentication app.

description: Cloud database backup failed overnight
suggested_action: Review backup logs, storage availability, and rerun backup job.

description: Data pipeline failed during nightly load
suggested_action: Check pipeline logs, source availability, and rerun failed job.

description: Company laptop will not turn on
suggested_action: Check charger, battery, and hardware diagnostics.

description: CRM application is showing blank screen
suggested_action: Clear browser cache, check app status, and review console errors.

description: Unauthorized login detected from another country
suggested_action: Disable account temporarily, reset credentials, and investigate sign-in logs.

description: Printer prints blank pages
suggested_action: Check toner, printer settings, and run printer maintenance.

description: Employee cannot access payroll portal
suggested_action: Verify payroll system permissions and user account status.

description: Azure VM CPU usage is very high
suggested_action: Review performance metrics, identify processes, and scale resources if needed.

description: Power BI users cannot view dashboard
suggested_action: Check workspace access, sharing settings, and report permissions.

description: Teams chat messages are delayed
suggested_action: Check Microsoft 365 service health and restart Teams client.

description: Phishing email reported by multiple employees
suggested_action: Block sender, remove email from mailboxes, and notify affected users.

description: Office network is completely down
suggested_action: Check core network devices, ISP status, and escalate outage immediately.
